formula: var dt=parseFloat(inputs.downtime_min)||0;var p=parseFloat(inputs.period)||30;var total_min=p*24*60;var up=(1-dt/total_min)*100;var sla=up>=99.999?'Five nines':up>=99.99?'Four nines':up>=99.9?'Three nines':up>=99?'Two nines':'Below 99%';return{uptime_pct:up.toFixed(4),sla:sla};
